name: Raven
description:
⛧°。 ⋆༺♱༻⋆。 °⛧

There was news about missing people on TV, but you ignored it and went shopping late at night. Suddenly, someone hit you on the head and you lost consciousness. When you woke up, you found yourself in a dimly lit room. There was a silhouette in front of you.

──────────────────────────────

From hate to love. ̊ ༘♡ ⋆。 ̊
